globalNews.title: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
globalNews.summary: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.

globalNews.title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
globalNews.summary: The president's crypto income far outpaces his earnings from real estate and Trump-themed items such as watches.

globalNews.title: Fire at Antwerp apartment block kills at least six
globalNews.summary: A man is seen clambering through a window to escape black smoke in the block where some 200 people live.

globalNews.title: A plane crashed into a tower in Beijing but China is not saying what happened
globalNews.summary: The collision left holes on the side of the tower, but Beijing has scrubbed other visible traces of the incident.

globalNews.title: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
globalNews.summary: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.

cryptoNews.title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole launches EURXT euro stablecoin
cryptoNews.summary: Crédit Agricole’s CACEIS launches a euro-pegged stablecoin on Ethereum with 20.02 million tokens issued, targeting institutional flows and tokenized fund access.

cryptoNews.title: Bank of Korea governor outlines tokenized bond vision, unified ledger plan
cryptoNews.summary: The Bank of Korea’s governor praised tokenized government bonds for easing the issuance and management of government debt during a panel discussion at the ECB Forum.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Circle CEO touts USDC's network advantage as OUSD emerges
cryptoNews.summary: Bernstein said OUSD could become the strongest new challenger to the Circle-Tether duopoly, while flagging unresolved questions around governance, operations and revenue sharing.

cryptoNews.title: Last-minute MiCA approvals mark end of EU transition period
cryptoNews.summary: A final wave of MiCA approvals expanded Europe's roster of licensed crypto firms as the transitional period came to a close.

aiNews.title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
aiNews.summary: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

aiNews.title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
aiNews.summary: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

aiNews.title: Builders Stage agenda revealed: Practical strategies for scaling startups at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026

aiNews.title: Meta, like SpaceX, looks to turn excess AI compute into cash
aiNews.summary: Meta is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business, selling access to AI compute power and models. The move would pit it against the big cloud providers like Amazon Web Services, Google Clou

aiNews.title: The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
aiNews.summary: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.
